title: Introduction to Random Variables
description: Understand random variables, sample spaces, discrete vs continuous types, and Bernoulli variables.

lessons.title: What is a Random Variable?
lessons.content:
## What is a Random Variable?

A random variable assigns a number to each outcome in a sample space.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Sample Space vs Random Variable
lessons.content:
## Sample Space vs Random Variable

Distinguish between outcomes and the numerical values assigned.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Discrete vs Continuous
lessons.content:
## Discrete vs Continuous

Discrete variables take countable values; continuous take any value in an interval.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Bernoulli Random Variables
lessons.content:
## Bernoulli Random Variables

Dummy variables with exactly two outcomes: success (1) or failure (0).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Real-Life Examples
lessons.content:
